name: Beauty Tool Demo
environment_block: bathroom vanity or bedroom makeup area, visible beauty products and tools, realistic home beauty environment, warm aesthetic lighting
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, handheld framing with bathroom mirror or vanity shots, natural hand movement showing beauty tools, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
product_interaction_block: creator demonstrates beauty tool in action, shows application process and final result, natural satisfaction with tool performance, pauses to explain benefits to camera
performance_block: enthusiastic beauty care energy, genuine curiosity and excitement, natural eye contact with camera during explanations, authentic reactions to beauty results
platform_block: realistic TikTok beauty content style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, authentic beauty enthusiast vibe, satisfying product demonstrations
lighting_block: warm vanity lighting or natural daylight, soft shadows, realistic beauty environment lighting, slight smartphone overexposure on bright surfaces
motion_block: natural hand movements when applying beauty products, smooth tool demonstrations, authentic satisfaction reactions with results
audio_block: subtle product application sounds, beauty tool operation sounds, bathroom environment ambience, authentic enthusiastic speaking tone
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no luxury beauty influencer aesthetic, no overly polished production
